Ashoka Vastushilp Private Limited having its Registered Offi(:e at 1/2 River View Ashok Stambh, Nashik-422002 (therein referred as concessionaire), hereby notifies that there shall be levied and collected fees on mechanical vehicles for the use of the bridge at the rates specified in the following table and authorises the concessionaire to collect and retain the paid fees ai the rates specified in the said table from the date of . publication of this notification in the Official Gazette till the completion of the extended period of Concession i.e. up to 3rdNovember, 2010. TABLE Serial C::ategories of vehicles Rate of fee Number (Rs.) I. Motorcycle, scooter or any other Nil mechanically two -wheeler propelled vehicle 2. Motorcar, taxi, jeep, pick-up van, 10~00 station wagon, tempo, ~uto rickshaw, three-wheeler scooter or other auto- driven light vehicles with or without trailer 3. Buses 25.00 4. Trucks or tankers 30.00 S. Heavy vehicles including trucks, 40.00 trailers combination, or other mechanically propelled vehicles not mentioned above like mobile crane, dozers, earth movers, road rollers, containers. NOTES: I. When a vehicle has to cross the bridge more than once in a day, the user shall have the option to pay the fee for multipie trips at one and halftimes the rate as specified in the above table while crossing the bridge in the frrst trip itself and where a vehil:le has to use the bridge continu- ously and frequently for entire month or even beyond that then the vehicle owner cart have a monthly pass on the payment of chqrges equ:\1 to thirty timf!s the·rate appli- cable for sfngle trip IJS specifi~ in the ahove table. 2. Fpllowing types of Vllhiclys aro exempted from the fee spC~:ified in the abpve Table, namely:- (i) Defelice Vehicles; (ii) Vehicles with VIP symbols; (iii) Police vehicles; (iv) Fire-fighting vehicles; (v) Ambulances; (vi) Funeral vans; (vii) Posts and Telegraph Department vehicles; and (viii) Central Government and State Government vehicles -- 2 of 3 -- • ['lWTIJ-~J(ii)] 3. The vehicles officially belonging to the following $hal1 be deeined to be vehicles having VIP symbol, namely:-- (i) the President of India; (ii) the Vice-President oflndia; (tii) Central and State Minister; (iv) Leader of Opposition in Lok Sabha, Rajya Sabha, State Legislature having the status of Cabinet Minister; (v) Govemors of States; (vi} Lieutenant Governors of Union Territories; (vii} Spe~ker. and Chairman of Central" and State Legislature; (viii) Executive Councilor of Local Elected Bodies; (ix) Foreign dignitaries on State Visit oflndia; 3 (x.) Foreign diplomats· stationed in Indian using cars w\th CD (Car Diplomatic) symbols. 4. The rates specified in the above table shall be displayed on a board erected at conspicuous places in the vicinity of the bridge. and the concessionaire or its authorised legal representative· shall give a receipt to the payer on each and every occasion of recovery of the aforesaid fee.
